title: Logarithmic Volume Control
description: Fixes volume sliders to work on the correct scale matching our perception
body:
**Note:** This mod is very simple and is highly unlikely to break across updates. If you're using a newer version (or snapshot) than what is listed as supported, try it anyway and it'll probably still work!

Minecraft's volume sliders work on a linear scale by default. Because we perceive loudness on a logarithmic scale instead, this is incorrect and makes them extremely ineffective until reaching the lower end. 

This mod simply fixes them to use the correct scale to match our perception.
